# seerr_discover_slider (Resource)

Manage discovery sliders in Seerr via `/api/v1/settings/discover`. This is a singleton resource that manages the entire list of sliders to ensure consistent ordering.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `sliders` (Block List) The list of discovery sliders. The order of this list determines the display order in Seerr. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--sliders))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--sliders"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sliders`

Required:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the slider is enabled.
- `type` (Number) The type of the slider (e.g., 1 for TV, 2 for Movie).

Optional:

- `data` (String) The data/query for the slider (only for custom sliders).
- `title` (String) The title of the slider (only for custom sliders).

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number) The internal ID of the slider.
- `is_built_in` (Boolean) Whether this is a built-in slider.
